## What & why

<!-- Describe the change and the motivation. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My **PR title** follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) — e.g. `feat: add prs-report.churn`, `fix: correct cycle-time math`, `docs: ...`. **The title drives the automatic version bump**, so make it accurate.
- [ ] Breaking changes (renamed/removed command or skill, run-dir data-contract change) use `feat!:` / `fix!:` or a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer.
- [ ] I did **not** hand-edit the `version` in `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` — release-please owns it (see [`.claude/rules/versioning.md`](../.claude/rules/versioning.md)).
